data.title: User Account Protection
data.description: Protects user accounts from unauthorized access using security measures.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures that data in transit and at rest is encrypted.
data.technical_spec: SSL/TLS for data in transit, AES for data at rest.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes automated tools and third-party assessments.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protects against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Uses advanced filtering and traffic analysis tools.

data.title: Machine Learning for Threat Detection
data.description: Uses ML algorithms to detect and respond to suspicious activities.
